name: gear-lsp
description: In-repo VS Code client for the gear demo language, served by fltk-lsp. Not for publication.

gear.server.command.markdownDescription: Override the command used to launch `fltk-lsp` (argv as a string array). Empty means use the in-repo `uv` default computed from the extension's location. Required when the extension is installed as a packaged `.vsix` outside the repo. Machine-scoped: workspace settings cannot set it, so a cloned repo's `.vscode/settings.json` cannot redirect the launched executable.
